title: 7/2/19 Google Earthing Atlantis Buildings in the Rings

transcript.text: Hello, Captain's Log for July 2nd, 2019.
It's 9.03 in the morning on a Tuesday.
So, I just, I kind of got up not that long ago.
And I've been working on my Google Earth of Atlantis.
I just got really stoned.
Yeah, so I'm diurnalized.
I passed out at like 2 in the morning or something like that.
And so, I think yesterday when I did my video,
I was like putting Hampton's houses on my inner ring.
So, what I'm working on is Google Earth in Atlantis.
And when you, like I started on the outside and coming in.
So, the part I'm working on is the part that everybody knows.
It's the island and then it's the ring of water.
And then the first island ring.
And then the second ring of water.
And then the second island ring.
And then the third ring of water.
So, right now I think I'm putting stuff on the first ring.
And yes, so yesterday I was, I was putting like house, like different buildings on.
And I think there's, there's also 20 more blocks that I'm putting buildings on, on the, the part on the outside of the outer ring.
So, I'm including a whole lot of historic buildings in the downtown area.
It's four blocks of, like the outdoor mall, just like here.
And then there's the pyramid of Mancare from Egypt.
And I have Chisanyisa pyramid and Takao pyramid.
And all the different, like, Israelite temples.
And, um, I've got, uh, I'm making Atlantis like, uh, like they had bikes.
So, I have velodromes and, uh, even a mini velodrome and, um, running, running courses and Olympic swimming pools.
And, um, yeah, I also put, um, uh, volleyball courts every hundred meters along the, uh, the beach.
And, uh, so on the inside, um, I put, on the, on the outer part of the outer ring, I put the Hamptons houses.
And so on the inside, um, I'm putting, I put like villages, like Asterix and, uh, uh, Bedrock, Indian Village.
But, um, but on the inside, but then also, um, on the other side of the canal, which divides it, um, I put, uh, houses from, uh, Beverly Hills, West Beverly Park.
Uh, like Sylvester Stallone's house and, uh, Eddie Murphy's house and Denzel Washington's house, Barry Bonds' house.
Um, and then, uh, oh, I have, I think I have, like, Bill Gates' house, uh, Scientology Celebrity Center.
Um, yeah, and, and, like, some castles down there, um, and, and then some buildings around the Capitol, like the Capitol Building and, uh, the, uh, uh, Smithsonian Institute Buildings.
And, uh, I think so right now I'm actually, uh, doing the, um, the Kremlin, uh, I think if the Kremlin fits.
It has, it has to be not wider than 150 meters.
I just tried to put the Palace of Rome and that didn't work.
It's way too big.
Um, Angkor Wat was too big, but then I put it in another part of the map, so, of the city.
Um, so, um, I think I filled everything up.
Yeah, last night I was just working, um, you know, right up until the part where I just got tired and went to sleep.
Um, I was, uh, just, just collecting images to throw on there.
I didn't have any, even sized a lot of them yet, just to fill up.
So, I filled up everything that I need to fill up.
Uh, I created City of Atlantis on the islands with real buildings.
Um, and, uh, yeah, so, it's all accurate.
Hmm.
Um, so, today when I get up, um, my project is to, uh, and today is the three-week anniversary of Atlantis project.
So, I think when I first started it, I was like, I, uh, you know, oh, I, uh, this is worth three weeks, so, this might take three weeks.
So, um, um, I mean, it might take another month.
Is it, is it worth, like, one twelfth a year, a whole month?
Yeah, um, but, you know, I think I can, I mean, I might be able to get done with the city today.
And then just, it might not be as complicated, um, I have to, I want to see, and I haven't even figured, thought, really.
I've tried, experimented how feasible it is.
But I want to, uh, see if I can illustrate 60,000, uh, 1.85 kilometer by 1.85 kilometer lots.
And the island of, uh, like, Andros, you know, the part just under the water that you can see the island.
It's not really, it's not deep.
It's only, the part where the, where the canal is, is only eight meters deep.
So, um, there's a trench.
I'm going to make, uh, um, uh, canals off of the trench they have there.
There's this really bizarre looking, it's three miles wide,
And it's perfectly straight for 40 miles.
And, uh, yeah, it's like, was that, is that when, uh, a comet grazed the earth?
Maybe that's what happened.
Like, earth got bombarded with a bunch of comets.
And, um, you know, we got hit head on by some, but maybe some went, like, like getting grazed by a bullet,
Just went and grazed the earth and then shot back out.
Um, and that was like, I guess, when it was above land.
But that's what it looked like.
Just, just this, it was like this perfectly, um, circular ditch hole that was just perfectly straight.
But anyway, I'm going to turn that into a, uh, canal.
Well, just in case they, they dug that.
Um, I should research what that is.
Um, so, uh, so, uh, yeah, I have to, um, build all this stuff up and size of buildings.
But it's, it's like more, uh, mindless stuff.
So, I can concentrate.
I could, like, listen to a book and stuff.
I listened to, uh, Communist Manifesto yesterday and, um, a bunch of Wikipedia articles about lists of paradoxes and, uh, experiments.
But I wasn't, yeah, wasn't a lot of music.
I was more concentrating on this.
But, yeah, today is more easy.
So, um, so, uh, yeah, maybe I can finish it today.
Oh, I have to do ships.
There's still room left over to put a bunch of real life ships down to size them.
Um, and, uh, I wanted to put a, um, you know, uh, submarine, but the water's only eight meters deep.
So, if it was deeper, I could have actually built it underwater.
But, um, okay, so, uh, by tomorrow, yeah, hopefully I'll be done with the city.
That'll be awesome.
Um, I'll try to upload this maybe and have it for download to show.
So, um, I lost, like, three books on my education page on my Cicero and a bunch of others weren't linked.
It was kind of a bummer.
It just, it showed them on the page and then how many pages they were, but then I couldn't find them anywhere.
There was another one that disappeared off my computer, too, but, and I had to recover it off the internet.
Anyway, um, yeah, by tomorrow, hopefully I'll be done with the actual city and I'll be working on the country outside the walls.
Okay, talk to you later.
